infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FitForm uses the camera to scan your face and body so it can tell you what suits you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FitForm uses your photos to add garments to your wardrobe.

plugins.cameraPermission: FitForm uses the camera to scan your face and body.

plugins.photosPermission: FitForm uses your photos to add garments to your wardrobe.
